random_messages.name: Dad joke
random_messages.prompt: Write a dad joke for a flip-board. Line 1-2: setup using very short words (max 15 chars per line). Line 3: punchline (max 15 chars). Choose jokes where every part fits in 15 characters — short words only.

random_messages.name: Creativity boost
random_messages.prompt: Write an inspiring creativity or innovation message for a flip-board. Use very short words only. Each line max 15 chars. Examples: THINK DIFFERENT / CREATE TODAY / BUILD SOMETHING / STAY CURIOUS. Punchy and motivating.

random_messages.name: Fun fact
random_messages.prompt: Write a surprising fun fact for a family flip-board. Keep it mind-blowing and brief. Short words only, max 15 chars per line.
